'''âs-dh-f''' ('''kasadhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mob|mob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mob|mob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kasadhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadhaf|thisadhaf]] || [[word:jisadhaf|jisadhaf]] || [[word:shisadhaf|shisadhaf]] || [[word:kisadhaf|kisadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadhaf|thuthusadhaf]] || [[word:jujusadhaf|jujusadhaf]] || [[word:shushusadhaf|shushusadhaf]] || [[word:kukusadhaf|kukusadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusadhaf|thusadhaf]] || [[word:jusadhaf|jusadhaf]] || [[word:shusadhaf|shusadhaf]] || [[word:kusadhaf|kusadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusadhaf|thusadhaf]] || [[word:jusadhaf|jusadhaf]] || [[word:shusadhaf|shusadhaf]] || [[word:kusadhaf|kusadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesadhaf|thesadhaf]] || [[word:jesadhaf|jesadhaf]] || [[word:shesadhaf|shesadhaf]] || [[word:kesadhaf|kesadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosadhaf|thothosadhaf]] || [[word:jojosadhaf|jojosadhaf]] || [[word:shoshosadhaf|shoshosadhaf]] || [[word:kokosadhaf|kokosadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadhaf|thosadhaf]] || [[word:josadhaf|josadhaf]] || [[word:shosadhaf|shosadhaf]] || [[word:kosadhaf|kosadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadhaf|thosadhaf]] || [[word:josadhaf|josadhaf]] || [[word:shosadhaf|shosadhaf]] || [[word:kosadhaf|kosadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsadhaf|thĂŠsadhaf]] || [[word:jĂŠsadhaf|jĂŠsadhaf]] || [[word:shĂŠsadhaf|shĂŠsadhaf]] || [[word:kĂŠsadhaf|kĂŠsadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasadhaf|thathasadhaf]] || [[word:jajasadhaf|jajasadhaf]] || [[word:shashasadhaf|shashasadhaf]] || [[word:kakasadhaf|kakasadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadhaf|thasadhaf]] || [[word:jasadhaf|jasadhaf]] || [[word:shasadhaf|shasadhaf]] || [[word:kasadhaf|kasadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadhaf|thasadhaf]] || [[word:jasadhaf|jasadhaf]] || [[word:shasadhaf|shasadhaf]] || [[word:kasadhaf|kasadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasadhaf|shasadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasadhaf|goshasadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasadhaf|gokishasadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasadhafnĂŒ|shasadhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasadhafnknĂŒ|goshasadhafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadhafnĂŒ|gokishasadhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasadhafshĂ«|shasadhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkshĂ«|goshasadhafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasadhafshĂ«|gokishasadhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadhafro|shasadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkro|goshasadhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadhafro|gokishasadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadhafmu|shasadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkmu|goshasadhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadhafmu|gokishasadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasadhafsher|shasadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasadhafnksher|goshasadhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasadhafsher|gokishasadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasadhafng|shasadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkng|goshasadhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasadhafng|gokishasadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasadhafya|shasadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkya|goshasadhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasadhafya|gokishasadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasadhafyam|shasadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkyam|goshasadhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasadhafyam|gokishasadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadhafnĂŒshĂ«|shasadhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadhafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasadhafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadhafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasadhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadhafnĂŒro|shasadhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadhafnknĂŒro|goshasadhafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadhafnĂŒro|gokishasadhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadhafnĂŒmu|shasadhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadhafnknĂŒmu|goshasadhafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadhafnĂŒmu|gokishasadhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadhafshĂ«nĂŒ|shasadhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasadhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadhafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasadhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadhafshĂ«ro|shasadhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkshĂ«ro|goshasadhafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadhafshĂ«ro|gokishasadhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadhafshĂ«mu|shasadhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkshĂ«mu|goshasadhafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadhafshĂ«mu|gokishasadhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadhafronĂŒ|shasadhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkronĂŒ|goshasadhafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadhafronĂŒ|gokishasadhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadhafroshĂ«|shasadhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkroshĂ«|goshasadhafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadhafroshĂ«|gokishasadhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasadhafromu|shasadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkromu|goshasadhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasadhafromu|gokishasadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasadhafmunĂŒ|shasadhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkmunĂŒ|goshasadhafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasadhafmunĂŒ|gokishasadhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasadhafmushĂ«|shasadhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkmushĂ«|goshasadhafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasadhafmushĂ«|gokishasadhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasadhafmuro|shasadhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasadhafnkmuro|goshasadhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasadhafmuro|gokishasadhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
